## 🔗 Cross-Team Insights

### 2. Distribution/Warehouse = Untapped Gold

Kelly Hawkins clicked twice, Elite Rapid Care 4 opens, Village at St Rose (new Scout find) is adjacent to dead-contact St. Rose Dominican. Healthcare dual-placement sequence is STILL not built (Week 10+ overdue per action items). This is leaving money on the table.
